name: Pokemon Scarlet & Violet - Hanging out with friends
description:
❄️Day 1: Pokémon Snow day❄️

So I'm starting this, also it's going to switch between fandoms.

Feel free to request what fandom or theme to do for a day, most of the Christmas bots will be in groups but if you want just a single person that's fine.

Have fun with this bot!
creator: Meh_2010
